title: ononis diffusa var. dehnhardtii
intro: Ononis diffusa var. dehnhardtii is a variety of the spreading restharrow plant, a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing symptoms of arthritis and gout, and helping to lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Ononis diffusa var. dehnhardtii are typically made from the root and leaf extracts, and can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions.
